summary: Strong PowerShell conventions in Bump-Version.ps1: proper error handling, -LiteralPath usage, parameter validation, descriptive errors. Workflow well-structured with pinned actions (v4) and least-privilege permissions. Brittle brittleness in Run-ActTests.ps1: hard-coded assertion for exactly 24 tests (line ~210) fails silently if test count changes; fixture paths assumed without validation (lines ~180-185); .actrc dependency undocumented and unchecked. Test harness will fail unpredictably if fixture structure doesn't match expected directories or test file doesn't have exactly 24 passing tests.
